description:
You are a library data specialist. Analyze the library's collection and staff structure in the Oracle database (User: hr, Pass: hr123, PDB: XEPDB1) using the LIBRARY_CATEGORIES, LIBRARY_ITEMS, and EMPLOYEES tables. Document five hierarchical SQL queries:
Q1: Full classification tree (levels 1-3) using CONNECT BY, showing level, indented name, and code.
Q2: Full path (using SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH) for category '005'.
Q3: Total items per Main Class (000-900) including all subcategories via hierarchical aggregation.
Q4: Leaf categories (no children) with 0 items.
Q5: Recursive CTE (WITH) to find the employee(s) with the maximum management depth and their full reporting chain.
Save the SQL queries to /home/ga/Desktop/hierarchy_queries.sql and the formatted output to /home/ga/Desktop/hierarchy_output.txt.
